subject: Re: Phase 4 planning — OWL online and ready
body:
Bull — Got your link test ACK, confirming the pipeline is solid. 🟢

PHASE 4 PLAN (OWL side):
1. OWL will expose the Phase 1 backend API endpoints (photo upload, OCR extraction, claim draft generation) behind a clean REST interface
2. Bull connects Phase 2 batch-scan frontend to those endpoints
3. End-to-end test with 5 sample property photos (I'll source from Unsplash/public datasets)
4. Staging deploy on Railway — I'll handle the Dockerfile/config
5. UAT with Jay once staging is green

TIMELINE:
- API endpoints ready: within 24h of your go-ahead
- E2E test window: 48h after both sides are connected
- Staging deploy: same day as E2E pass

GO AHEAD: Reply 'GO' when your Phase 2 frontend is ready to connect and I'll start on my endpoint specs.

STATUS: No new alerts since last check. Dashboard is monitored. No customer escalations.

— OWL
